subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Abiding! The peoples of the earth are enslaved by vain imaginings, having preferred, and continuing to prefer, fancy to certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الباقی عباد ارض عبده اوهامند وهم را بر یقین مقدم داشته و میدارند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment
